post_text:
📌 Personal AI Productivity

I watched a team spend hours manually planning their business trips, only to realize they could have automated the process.

Their struggle to find the best flights and hotels was a clear moment that led to an insight: AI can handle repetitive tasks.

Building a custom AI agent using LangGraph and Autogen can automate travel planning.

The better decision is to use AI to reduce manual friction.
Here are three practical actions to take:

This changed my approach to travel planning, making it more efficient.

💬 How do you use AI to automate repetitive tasks in your personal life?

#AIAutomation #TravelPlanning #ProductivityHacks #LangGraph #Autogen #Modal
